# DevStackBox
> Free, open-source local PHP development stack for Windows (Apache, PHP, MySQL, phpMyAdmin).

## Product
- Download: https://www.devstackbox.com/download
- Docs: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/DevStackBox/DevStackBox

## Key docs
- Installation: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/getting-started/installation
- Upgrading: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/getting-started/upgrading
- Configuration: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/reference/configuration
- Troubleshooting: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/advanced/troubleshooting
- FAQ: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/faq
- Feature status: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/feature-status
- Roadmap: https://www.devstackbox.com/docs/roadmap

## Policies
- License: MIT - https://www.devstackbox.com/license
- Privacy: https://www.devstackbox.com/privacy
- Security: https://www.devstackbox.com/security
- Code of Conduct: https://www.devstackbox.com/community#code-of-conduct

## Full text (source)
- Docs source (MDX): https://github.com/DevStackBox/DevStackBox/tree/main/docs
- Extended index: https://www.devstackbox.com/llms-full.txt
